example_chain.faction.pirate_corsairs.de: A loose coalition of pirate bands operating in the Periphery.
example_chain.event.pirate_rising.title: Pirate Rising
example_chain.event.pirate_rising.desc: Intelligence reports indicate the Corsair Confederacy is massing for a major raid. Local militias are offering lucrative short-term contracts.
example_chain.event.salvage_windfall.des: While patrolling the outer system, your scouts discover a derelict DropShip adrift. Its cargo bay contains intact components and spare parts.
example_chain.contract.pirate_sweep.name: Pirate Sweep
example_chain.contract.pirate_sweep.brie: Clear pirate staging points in the outer belt. Expect light resistance but tricky navigation.
example_chain.mercenary_rating.elite: Elite Mercenaries of the Corsair Front
